task_completion.description: OpenToonz application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz main window and interface are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A Toonz Raster level is created or selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green column in the Xsheet or a green cell in the timeline/level strip, which indicates a Toonz Raster level in OpenToonz.

task_completion.description: A non-white geometric shape or brush stroke is drawn on the first frame.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas shows a visible, non-white drawing (shape or stroke), and Frame 1 is selected in the Xsheet or timeline.

task_completion.description: The Output Settings dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' window is visible over the OpenToonz interface.

task_completion.description: The output directory is set to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Output Settings dialog, the 'Save In' field is set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/test_card'.

task_completion.description: The output filename and format are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Output Settings dialog, the 'Name' field is set to 'testcard' and the format dropdown is set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: The frame is rendered to the specified output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar/window is shown, or a file manager window is open showing 'testcard.png' inside the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/test_card' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI tools to draw the shape or stroke.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen selecting drawing tools (brush, geometric tool) and interacting with the canvas, rather than importing an existing image.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to configure and execute the render.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog and Render commands are accessed via the OpenToonz menus, not via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The rendered image corresponds to what was drawn on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing visible on the OpenToonz canvas matches the expected output, confirming it wasn't replaced by a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must export the image to exactly '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/test_card/testcard.png'. The final exported image must have a minimum width of 400 pixels, a minimum height of 300 pixels, and a file size strictly greater than 1 KB. It must also contain at least two unique colors and >0.5% non-background coverage to confirm it is not blank.
